message:
test(perf): column-list INSERT eligibility probe, EXISTS validation formatting, and column-list INSERT benchmarks

prepared_hit_rate_proof.rs (bd-wwqen.3):
- New test_bd_wwqen_3_column_list_insert_direct_path_eligibility:
  documents the current behavior gap where INSERT INTO t(col1,
  col2) VALUES(?, ?) bypasses the direct insert fast path
- Three sub-tests: no column list (verifies 100 direct_insert
  executions), same-order column list (documents VDBE fallback
  without hard-failing), different-order column list (verifies
  data integrity after reordering)
- Prints fix-status summary designed to signal when bd-wwqen.3
  lands
- Formatting fixes: .unwrap() on own lines, eprintln args reformatted

in_exists_regression.rs:
- Pure formatting: .unwrap() calls moved to their own lines across
  7 test functions — no behavioral changes

operation_baseline_bench.rs:
- New benchmark group bench_column_list_insert_prepared with 5
  benchmarks comparing column-list vs. no-column-list INSERT
  performance across frankensqlite and C SQLite baselines
- Config: 20 samples, 15s measurement, 1000 elements throughput

.beads/issues.jsonl:
- bd-wwqen.1: document count_all_rows audit + isSimpleCount
  archaeology
- bd-wwqen.2: diagnose EXISTS 20x slowness root cause (eager
  AST materialization), document SQLite 4-tier IN strategy,
  EXISTS direct-probe validation matrix
- bd-wwqen.3: update column-list INSERT eligibility status

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
